# Litestar-Vite – Full LLM Reference

> Generated from source files. Every fact below is verified against the
> codebase at version 0.22.2.

## Project Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| PyPI name | litestar-vite |
| npm name | litestar-vite-plugin |
| Version | 0.22.2 |
| License | MIT |
| Python | >=3.10 |
| Node | ^20.19.0 \|\| >=22.12.0 |
| Vite peer | ^7.0.0 \|\| ^8.0.0 |

Python dependencies: litestar>=2.7.0, httpx>=0.24.1, websockets>=12.0, typing_extensions
Optional extras: jinja (jinja2), nodeenv (nodeenv), http2 (h2>=4.0.0)

npm dependencies: picocolors ^1.1.1, vite-plugin-full-reload ^1.2.0
npm bin: clean-orphaned-assets, litestar-vite-typegen

---

## Overview

Litestar-Vite connects the Litestar Python web framework to the Vite
frontend build tool. It supports SPA, Template/HTMX, Hybrid (Inertia.js),
Framework (SSR/SSG meta-framework), and External (non-Vite, e.g. Angular CLI)
serving modes.

Key capabilities:
- Dev-time proxy from Litestar to Vite (HMR, WebSocket forwarding)
- Production manifest-based asset resolution (with `.vite/` subdir support for meta-frameworks)
- Inertia.js v2/v3 protocol support (lazy, defer, once, optional, always, merge,
  scroll props, history encryption, precognition)
- Type generation pipeline (OpenAPI -> TypeScript via @hey-api/openapi-ts +
  ergonomic schemas helpers + Inertia page-props)
- Typed route generation (Ziggy-style)
- Bridge file (.litestar.json) as Python-to-JavaScript config contract
- Static-props bridge surfaced via `virtual:litestar-static-props`
- CDN deployment via fsspec
- CLI commands under `litestar assets`

---

## Installation

```bash
pip install litestar-vite          # core
pip install litestar-vite[jinja]   # Jinja2 template support
pip install litestar-vite[http2]   # HTTP/2 proxy (h2)
pip install litestar-vite[nodeenv] # nodeenv auto-detection

npm install litestar-vite-plugin   # Vite plugin
```

---

## Upstream Update Sources

Use official docs plus official release feeds when checking for updates. For this repo, the package registry version is not enough because template/bootstrap, SSR, proxy, and typegen assumptions often change before or alongside dependency range updates.

- **Inertia**
  - Docs: https://inertiajs.com/
  - Releases: https://github.com/inertiajs/inertia/releases
  - Packages/source: https://github.com/inertiajs/inertia
  - Re-check here when it changes: `src/py/litestar_vite/inertia/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/handler/_app.py`, `src/py/litestar_vite/html_transform.py`, `examples/react-inertia*`, `examples/vue-inertia*`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/*inertia*`, `docs/inertia/`, `docs/frameworks/inertia.rst`, `README.md`, `llms*.txt`

- **React / react-dom**
  - Docs: https://react.dev/
  - Versions/releases: https://react.dev/versions and https://github.com/facebook/react/releases
  - Packages/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/react , https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-dom , https://github.com/facebook/react
  - Re-check here when it changes: `examples/react*/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/react*/`, React SSR entries (`resources/ssr.tsx*`), `docs/frameworks/react.rst`, `docs/frameworks/inertia.rst`, `src/py/tests/integration/test_examples.py`

- **Vue / @vue/server-renderer**
  - Docs: https://vuejs.org/
  - Releases: https://vuejs.org/about/releases and https://github.com/vuejs/core/releases
  - Packages/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/vue , https://www.npmjs.com/package/@vue/server-renderer , https://github.com/vuejs/core
  - Re-check here when it changes: `examples/vue*/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/vue*/`, Vue SSR entries (`resources/ssr.ts*`), `docs/frameworks/vue.rst`, `docs/frameworks/inertia.rst`, `src/py/tests/integration/test_examples.py`

- **Svelte**
  - Docs: https://svelte.dev/docs
  - Releases: https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/releases and https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/blob/main/packages/svelte/CHANGELOG.md
  - Package/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/svelte , https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte
  - Re-check here when it changes: `examples/svelte/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/svelte/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/svelte-inertia/`, `docs/frameworks/svelte.rst`, `docs/inertia/installation.rst`, `src/py/tests/integration/test_examples.py`

- **SvelteKit**
  - Docs: https://svelte.dev/docs/kit
  - Releases/migrations: https://github.com/sveltejs/kit/releases , https://github.com/sveltejs/kit/blob/main/packages/kit/CHANGELOG.md , https://svelte.dev/docs/kit/migrating-to-sveltekit-2 , https://svelte.dev/docs/cli/sv-migrate
  - Package/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sveltejs/kit , https://github.com/sveltejs/kit
  - Re-check here when it changes: `examples/sveltekit/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/sveltekit/`, `src/js/src/sveltekit.ts`, `docs/frameworks/sveltekit.rst`, `src/py/tests/e2e/server_manager.py`, `src/py/tests/integration/test_examples.py`

- **Astro**
  - Docs: https://docs.astro.build/ and upgrade guides under https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/upgrade-to/
  - Releases: https://github.com/withastro/astro/releases
  - Package/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/astro , https://github.com/withastro/astro
  - Re-check here when it changes: `src/js/src/astro.ts`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/astro/`, `examples/astro/`, `docs/frameworks/astro.rst`, `src/py/tests/integration/test_examples.py`

- **Nuxt / Nitro**
  - Docs: https://nuxt.com/docs and https://nuxt.com/docs/getting-started/upgrade ; Nitro docs: https://nitro.build/
  - Releases: https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/releases and https://github.com/nitrojs/nitro/releases
  - Packages/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/nuxt , https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt , https://www.npmjs.com/package/nitropack , https://github.com/nitrojs/nitro
  - Re-check here when it changes: `src/js/src/nuxt.ts`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/nuxt/`, `examples/nuxt/`, `docs/frameworks/nuxt.rst`, `src/py/tests/unit/test_ssr_proxy_hmr.py`, `examples/nuxt/app.py`

- **Angular / Angular CLI / Analog**
  - Docs: https://angular.dev/ , https://angular.dev/tools/cli , https://angular.dev/update-guide , https://angular.dev/tools/cli/build-system-migration
  - Releases: https://angular.dev/reference/releases , https://github.com/angular/angular/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md , https://github.com/angular/angular-cli/releases
  - Packages/source: https://github.com/angular/angular , https://github.com/angular/angular-cli , https://github.com/analogjs/analog
  - Re-check here when it changes: `examples/angular/`, `examples/angular-cli/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/angular/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/angular-cli/`, `docs/frameworks/angular.rst`, `src/py/litestar_vite/config/_runtime.py`, `src/py/litestar_vite/scaffolding/templates.py`

- **HTMX**
  - Docs: https://htmx.org/docs/
  - Releases/posts: https://github.com/bigskysoftware/htmx/releases and https://htmx.org/posts/
  - Packages/source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/htmx.org , https://github.com/bigskysoftware/htmx , https://github.com/litestar-org/litestar-htmx
  - Re-check here when it changes: `examples/jinja-htmx/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/templates/htmx/`, `src/js/src/helpers/htmx.ts`, `src/js/tests/helpers/htmx.test.ts`, `docs/frameworks/htmx.rst`, `src/py/litestar_vite/scaffolding/templates.py`

- **Core stack**
  - Litestar docs/releases: https://docs.litestar.dev/latest/ and https://github.com/litestar-org/litestar/releases
  - Vite docs/releases: https://vite.dev/ and https://github.com/vitejs/vite/releases
  - Bun docs/releases: https://bun.com/docs and https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/releases
  - Granian docs/releases: https://github.com/emmett-framework/granian and https://github.com/emmett-framework/granian/releases
  - httpx docs/releases: https://www.python-httpx.org/ and https://github.com/encode/httpx/releases
  - @hey-api/openapi-ts docs/releases: https://heyapi.dev/openapi-ts/get-started and https://github.com/hey-api/openapi-ts/releases
  - Re-check here when these change: `src/py/litestar_vite/plugin/`, `src/py/litestar_vite/executor.py`, `src/py/litestar_vite/config/_runtime.py`, `src/py/litestar_vite/codegen/`, `src/js/src/index.ts`, `src/js/src/shared/`, proxy/SSR tests, `README.md`, `llms*.txt`

- **Docs theme / Shibuya**
  - Docs: https://shibuya.lepture.com/
  - Releases/changelog: https://github.com/lepture/shibuya/releases
  - Re-check here when it changes: `docs/conf.py`, `docs/_static/theme.css`, `docs/_static/layout.css`, `docs/_static/code.css`, `docs/_static/theme.js`, `docs/_templates/components/copy-page-button.html`, `CONTRIBUTING.rst`, `README.md`, `llms*.txt`
  - Local design reference: the official docs code palette is intentionally based on the SQLSpec WASM playground styling; if the sibling workspace is available, inspect `../sqlspec/docs/_static/custom.css` and `../sqlspec/tools/sphinx_ext/playground_template.html` before changing syntax colors or action chrome.

---

## Python API

### PathConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._paths`

```python
@dataclass
class PathConfig:
    root: str | Path                    # default: Path.cwd()
    bundle_dir: str | Path              # default: Path("public")
    resource_dir: str | Path            # default: Path("src")
    static_dir: str | Path              # default: Path("public")
    manifest_name: str                  # default: "manifest.json"
    hot_file: str                       # default: "hot"
    asset_url: str                      # default: os.getenv("ASSET_URL", "/static/")
    ssr_output_dir: str | Path | None   # default: None
```

Post-init: normalizes all string paths to Path objects. If static_dir == bundle_dir,
adjusts static_dir to resource_dir / "public" to avoid Vite publicDir collision.
Ensures asset_url ends with "/".

### RuntimeConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._runtime`

```python
@dataclass
class RuntimeConfig:
    dev_mode: bool                                          # default: VITE_DEV_MODE env in TRUE_VALUES
    proxy_mode: Literal['vite', 'direct', 'proxy'] | None  # default: resolve_proxy_mode() from VITE_PROXY_MODE env
    external_dev_server: ExternalDevServer | str | None     # default: None
    host: str                                               # default: VITE_HOST env or "127.0.0.1"
    port: int                                               # default: VITE_PORT env or 5173
    protocol: Literal["http", "https"]                      # default: "http"
    executor: Literal['node','bun','deno','yarn','pnpm'] | None  # default: None (resolved to "node")
    run_command: list[str] | None                           # default: None (auto from executor)
    build_command: list[str] | None                         # default: None (auto from executor)
    build_watch_command: list[str] | None                   # default: None (auto from executor)
    serve_command: list[str] | None                         # default: None (auto from executor)
    install_command: list[str] | None                       # default: None (auto from executor)
    is_react: bool                                          # default: False
    health_check: bool                                      # default: VITE_HEALTH_CHECK env in TRUE_VALUES
    detect_nodeenv: bool                                    # default: False
    set_environment: bool                                   # default: True
    set_static_folders: bool                                # default: True
    csp_nonce: str | None                                   # default: None
    spa_handler: bool                                       # default: True
    http2: bool                                             # default: True
    start_dev_server: bool                                  # default: True
    trusted_proxies: list[str] | str | None                 # default: resolve_trusted_proxies() from LITESTAR_TRUSTED_PROXIES env
```

Post-init: if external_dev_server is a string, wraps it in ExternalDevServer(target=...).
If external_dev_server is set and proxy_mode is None or "vite", auto-sets proxy_mode to "proxy".
If executor is None, defaults to "node". Sets run/build/build_watch/serve/install commands based on executor.

Executor command defaults (run / build / build_watch / serve / install):

| Executor | run | build | build_watch | serve | install |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| node | npm run dev | npm run build | npm run watch | npm run serve | npm install |
| bun | bun run dev | bun run build | bun run watch | bun run serve | bun install |
| deno | deno task dev | deno task build | deno task watch | deno task serve | deno install |
| yarn | yarn dev | yarn build | yarn watch | yarn serve | yarn install |
| pnpm | pnpm dev | pnpm build | pnpm watch | pnpm serve | pnpm install |

### ExternalDevServer

Source: `litestar_vite.config._runtime`

```python
@dataclass
class ExternalDevServer:
    target: str | None              # default: None
    command: list[str] | None       # default: None
    build_command: list[str] | None # default: None
    http2: bool                     # default: False
    enabled: bool                   # default: True
```

### TypeGenConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._types`

```python
@dataclass
class TypeGenConfig:
    output: Path                            # default: Path("src/generated")
    openapi_path: Path | None               # default: None -> output / "openapi.json"
    routes_path: Path | None                # default: None -> output / "routes.json"
    routes_ts_path: Path | None             # default: None -> output / "routes.ts"
    generate_zod: bool                      # default: False
    generate_sdk: bool                      # default: True
    generate_routes: bool                   # default: True
    generate_page_props: bool               # default: True
    generate_schemas: bool                  # default: True
    schemas_ts_path: Path | None            # default: None -> output / "schemas.ts"
    global_route: bool                      # default: False
    fallback_type: Literal['unknown','any'] # default: "unknown"
    type_import_paths: dict[str, str]       # default: {}
    page_props_path: Path | None            # default: None -> output / "inertia-pages.json"
    extra_commands: Sequence[Sequence[str]] # default: [] -- additional [binary, *args] to run during generate-types (resolved via project JS executor)
```

`generate_schemas=True` emits a `schemas.ts` file with ergonomic helpers like
`FormInput<'api:login'>`, `FormResponse<'api:login', 201>`, and
`SuccessResponse<'api:login'>` on top of the @hey-api/openapi-ts output. Requires
`generate_sdk=True`.

`page_props_path` is the JSON metadata file the npm plugin reads to emit
`page-props.ts`. `generate_page_props=True` requires Inertia to be enabled
(validated by `ViteConfig.validate_mode()`).

### InertiaConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._inertia`

```python
@dataclass
class InertiaConfig:
    root_template: str                              # default: "index.html"
    component_opt_keys: tuple[str, ...]             # default: ("component", "page")
    redirect_unauthorized_to: str | None            # default: None
    redirect_404: str | None                        # default: None
    extra_static_page_props: dict[str, Any]         # default: {}
    extra_session_page_props: set[str] | dict[str, type]  # default: set()
    encrypt_history: bool                           # default: False
    type_gen: InertiaTypeGenConfig | None            # default: None
    ssr: InertiaSSRConfig | bool | None              # default: None
    use_script_element: bool                         # default: True
    precognition: bool                               # default: False
```

Post-init: if ssr is True, replaces with InertiaSSRConfig(). If ssr is False, replaces with None.

Property: `ssr_config -> InertiaSSRConfig | None` -- returns config when enabled, else None.

Notes:
- The Inertia transport defaults to a JSON `<script type="application/json" id="app_page" data-page="app">` element for full-page HTML bootstrap. Inertia v3 clients use that transport automatically. If you pin Inertia v2, the browser entry must also opt into `createInertiaApp({ defaults: { future: { useScriptElementForInitialPage: true } } })`, and the SSR entry should mirror that setting when SSR is enabled. Set `InertiaConfig(use_script_element=False)` to keep the legacy `data-page` attribute bootstrap.
- `ssr=True` enables Inertia's separate Node SSR renderer for initial HTML responses. It is not the same as framework proxy mode (`mode="framework"` / alias `mode="ssr"`).
- `precognition=True` registers a `ValidationException` handler that returns Laravel-format errors when the `Precognition` header is present. Pair with the `@precognition` decorator to short-circuit the handler body on successful validation (see Precognition section).

### InertiaSSRConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._inertia`

```python
@dataclass
class InertiaSSRConfig:
    enabled: bool     # default: True
    url: str          # default: "http://127.0.0.1:13714/render"
    timeout: float    # default: 2.0
```

### InertiaTypeGenConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._inertia`

```python
@dataclass
class InertiaTypeGenConfig:
    include_default_auth: bool   # default: True
    include_default_flash: bool  # default: True
```

### DeployConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._deploy`

```python
@dataclass
class DeployConfig:
    enabled: bool                      # default: True
    storage_backend: str | None        # default: VITE_DEPLOY_STORAGE env
    storage_options: dict[str, Any]    # default: default_storage_options()
    asset_url: str | None              # default: VITE_DEPLOY_ASSET_URL env
    delete_orphaned: bool              # default: VITE_DEPLOY_DELETE env in TRUE_VALUES (default "true")
    include_manifest: bool             # default: True
    content_types: dict[str, str]      # default: default_content_types()
```

Post-init: re-reads env fallbacks for `storage_backend`/`asset_url`, and ensures
`asset_url` ends with "/" when set.

Method: `with_overrides(storage_backend, storage_options, asset_url, delete_orphaned) -> DeployConfig`

When `enabled=True` and `asset_url` is set, the value is written to `.litestar.json`
as `deployAssetUrl` and used by the Vite plugin as `base` during `vite build`.

### SPAConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._spa`

```python
@dataclass
class SPAConfig:
    inject_csrf: bool                  # default: True
    csrf_var_name: str                 # default: "__LITESTAR_CSRF__"
    app_selector: str                  # default: "#app"
    cache_transformed_html: bool       # default: True
    cache_duration: int                # default: 0
```

Caching is automatically disabled when `inject_csrf=True` because CSRF tokens are
per-request. `cache_duration` controls the HTTP `Cache-Control` max-age sent with
the SPA HTML response (defaults to 0 to ensure browsers fetch fresh `index.html`
after deployments).

### LoggingConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._spa`

```python
@dataclass
class LoggingConfig:
    level: Literal['quiet','normal','verbose']  # default: get_default_log_level() from LITESTAR_VITE_LOG_LEVEL env
    show_paths_absolute: bool                    # default: False
    suppress_npm_output: bool                    # default: False
    suppress_vite_banner: bool                   # default: False
    timestamps: bool                             # default: False
```

### ViteConfig

Source: `litestar_vite.config._vite`

```python
@dataclass
class ViteConfig:
    mode: Literal['spa','template','htmx','hybrid','inertia','framework','ssr','ssg','external'] | None  # default: None (auto-detected)
    paths: PathConfig                           # default: PathConfig()
    runtime: RuntimeConfig                      # default: RuntimeConfig()
    types: TypeGenConfig | bool | None          # default: None
    inertia: InertiaConfig | bool | None        # default: None
    spa: SPAConfig | bool | None                # default: None
    logging: LoggingConfig | bool | None        # default: None
    dev_mode: bool                              # default: False
    base_url: str | None                        # default: VITE_BASE_URL env
    deploy: DeployConfig | bool                 # default: False
    static_props: dict[str, Any]                # default: {}
    guards: Sequence[Guard] | None              # default: None
    exclude_static_from_auth: bool              # default: True
    spa_path: str | None                        # default: None
    include_root_spa_paths: bool                # default: False
```

Mode aliases: "ssr"/"ssg" -> "framework", "inertia" -> "hybrid"

Shortcut normalization:
- types=True -> TypeGenConfig()
- types=False/None -> None
- inertia=True -> InertiaConfig()
- inertia=False -> None
- spa=True -> SPAConfig() (also auto-set when mode in {"spa","hybrid"} and spa is None)
- spa=None for non-spa/hybrid modes -> False
- logging=True/False/None -> LoggingConfig()
- deploy=True -> DeployConfig(enabled=True)
- deploy=False -> DeployConfig(enabled=False)
- dev_mode=True -> runtime.dev_mode = True

Auto-detection (when mode is None):
1. Inertia enabled -> "hybrid"
2. index.html found in candidate paths -> "spa"
3. Jinja2 installed -> "template"
4. Default -> "spa"

Auto-enable dev mode: if mode auto-detected as "spa"/"hybrid" and no built assets
found, dev_mode is enabled (unless VITE_AUTO_DEV_MODE=False).

Auto-detect React: reads package.json for @vitejs/plugin-react, auto-enables `runtime.is_react`.

Auto-configure Inertia: when an `InertiaConfig` is present alongside an `SPAConfig`,
`spa.inject_csrf` is forced to `True` so Inertia forms keep CSRF protection.

Framework mode defaults (mode="framework"):
- Dev: proxy_mode="proxy", spa_handler=False (set `VITE_PROXY_MODE` to override)
- Prod with built assets: proxy_mode=None, spa_handler=True
- Prod without built assets: proxy_mode=None, spa_handler=False

Production warning: when `mode in {"spa","hybrid"}` runs in production without a
built manifest and without an external dev server, a warning is logged unless the
current CLI command is one of `install`, `build`, `init`, `serve`, `deploy`,
`doctor`, `generate-types`, `export-routes`, or `status`.

Key properties:
- bundle_dir, resource_dir, static_dir, root_dir, manifest_name, hot_file, asset_url -> Path/str
- host, port, protocol -> delegated to runtime
- hot_reload -> bool (dev_mode AND proxy_mode in {vite, direct, proxy})
- is_dev_mode, is_react -> bool
- run_command, build_command, build_watch_command, install_command -> list[str]
- serve_command -> list[str] | None
- proxy_mode, spa_handler, http2, csp_nonce -> delegated to runtime
- trusted_proxies -> delegated to runtime
- external_dev_server -> ExternalDevServer | None
- spa_config -> SPAConfig | None
- deploy_config -> DeployConfig | None (None when not enabled)
- logging_config -> LoggingConfig (always available after normalization)
- ssr_output_dir -> Path | None
- executor -> JSExecutor (lazily created)

Key methods:
- candidate_index_html_paths() -> list[Path]
- candidate_manifest_paths() -> list[Path]  (also probes `<bundle>/.vite/manifest.json`)
- resolve_manifest_path() -> Path
- has_built_assets() -> bool  (manifest OR built `index.html` in bundle_dir)
- validate_mode() -> None (raises ValueError on invalid combinations)
- reset_executor() -> None  (call after mutating logging config to refresh executor instance)

`PaginationContainer` protocol is also exported from `litestar_vite.config._vite`.
Any type with an `items` attribute satisfies it; built-in support covers
`litestar.pagination.OffsetPagination`, `ClassicPagination`, and
`advanced_alchemy.service.OffsetPagination`.

---

### VitePlugin

Source: `litestar_vite.plugin`

```python
class VitePlugin(InitPluginProtocol, CLIPlugin):
    def __init__(
        self,
        config: ViteConfig | None = None,
        asset_loader: ViteAssetLoader | None = None,
        static_files_config: StaticFilesConfig | None = None,
    ) -> None: ...

    @property
    def config(self) -> ViteConfig: ...
    @property
    def asset_loader(self) -> ViteAssetLoader: ...
    @property
    def spa_handler(self) -> AppHandler | None: ...
    @property
    def proxy_client(self) -> httpx.AsyncClient | None: ...

    def on_app_init(self, app_config: AppConfig) -> AppConfig: ...
    def on_cli_init(self, cli: Group) -> None: ...

    @contextmanager
    def server_lifespan(self, app: Litestar) -> Iterator[None]: ...

    @asynccontextmanager
    async def lifespan(self, app: Litestar) -> AsyncIterator[None]: ...
```

`on_app_init` wires:
- Signature namespace (Response, Request)
- ProxyHeadersMiddleware if `runtime.trusted_proxies` is set
- NotFoundException handler (Vite vs static fallback depending on mode)
- InertiaPlugin if inertia config present
- Jinja2 template callables (`vite_hmr`, `vite`, `vite_static`, `vite_routes`) for template/htmx modes
- Static file serving router (skips when running CLI subcommands that don't need it)
- Dev proxy middleware (`ViteProxyMiddleware`, HMR WebSocket handler, optional SSR proxy controller)
- SPA handler (`AppHandler`) for spa/framework modes, honoring `spa_path`/`include_root_spa_paths`/`guards`/`exclude_static_from_auth`
- Lifespan registration (per-process and once-before-workers)

`server_lifespan` (runs ONCE before workers, when `set_environment=True`):
- Sets environment variables (see Environment Variables table)
- Exports type metadata (`export_integration_assets`)
- Picks free dev port and writes `.litestar.json`
- Starts/stops Vite dev server process (or external dev server)
- Writes hotfile when running internally
- Runs health check when `health_check=True`

`lifespan` (runs per worker):
- Sets per-process environment variables
- Initializes shared proxy `httpx.AsyncClient` (HTTP/2 when `http2=True`)
- Initializes `ViteAssetLoader` and `AppHandler`
- Cleans up on shutdown

### InertiaPlugin

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia.plugin`

```python
class InertiaPlugin(InitPluginProtocol):
    def __init__(self, config: InertiaConfig) -> None: ...

    @asynccontextmanager
    async def lifespan(self, app: Litestar) -> AsyncGenerator[None, None]: ...

    @property
    def ssr_client(self) -> httpx.AsyncClient | None: ...

    def on_app_init(self, app_config: AppConfig) -> AppConfig: ...
```

`on_app_init`:
- Validates a session middleware (`SessionMiddleware` or `MiddlewareWrapper`) is present (raises `ImproperlyConfiguredException`)
- Registers exception handlers (`Exception`, `HTTPException` -> `exception_to_http_response`)
- Registers a Precognition `ValidationException` handler when `precognition=True`
- Sets `request_class=InertiaRequest`, `response_class=InertiaResponse`
- Adds `InertiaMiddleware`
- Extends `signature_types` with `InertiaRequest`, `InertiaResponse`, `InertiaBack`, `StaticProp`, `DeferredProp`
- Registers type encoders/decoders for `StaticProp` and `DeferredProp`
- Appends `_wrap_app_handlers` to `on_startup` so async Inertia prop callbacks run inside Litestar's request `AsyncExitStack` (DI-scoped resources stay alive during prop resolution)

`lifespan`:
- Creates a shared `httpx.AsyncClient` for SSR fan-out
  (`max_keepalive_connections=10`, `max_connections=20`, `keepalive_expiry=30s`,
  default request timeout 10s) and closes it on shutdown.

### AppHandler

Source: `litestar_vite.handler._app`

```python
class AppHandler:
    def __init__(self, config: ViteConfig) -> None: ...

    @property
    def is_initialized(self) -> bool: ...

    async def initialize_async(self, vite_url: str | None = None) -> None: ...
    def initialize_sync(self, vite_url: str | None = None) -> None: ...
    async def shutdown_async(self) -> None: ...

    async def get_html(self, request: Request[Any, Any, Any], *, page_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> str: ...
    def get_html_sync(self, *, page_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None, csrf_token: str | None = None) -> str: ...
    async def get_bytes(self) -> bytes: ...

    def create_route_handler(self) -> Any: ...
```

Serves SPA HTML with CSRF injection, page data injection (data-page attribute or
script element via `SPAConfig.app_selector`), and Vite dev script injection in
dev mode. In dev with `proxy_mode != "direct"`, requests to the SPA route fetch
HTML from the Vite dev server through the shared proxy client.

### ViteAssetLoader

Source: `litestar_vite.loader`

```python
class ViteAssetLoader:
    def __init__(self, config: ViteConfig) -> None: ...

    @classmethod
    def initialize_loader(cls, config: ViteConfig) -> ViteAssetLoader: ...

    async def initialize(self) -> None: ...
    def parse_manifest(self) -> None: ...

    def render_hmr_client(self) -> markupsafe.Markup: ...
    def render_asset_tag(self, path: str | list[str], scripts_attrs: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> markupsafe.Markup: ...
    def get_static_asset(self, path: str) -> str: ...

    @cached_property
    def version_id(self) -> str: ...
```

Jinja2 template callables (registered when mode is template/htmx):
- `{{ vite_hmr() }}` - renders HMR client script tag
- `{{ vite("src/main.ts") }}` - renders asset script/link tags (string or list)
- `{{ vite_static("image.png") }}` - returns a static asset URL
- `{{ vite_routes(only=..., exclude=..., include_components=False) }}` - inline `<script>` populating `window.Litestar.routes` from `generate_routes_json`

---

## Inertia.js Helpers

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia.helpers`

### Prop Wrappers

```python
def lazy(key: str, value_or_callable: T | Callable | None = None) -> StaticProp | DeferredProp
```
Excluded from initial load, only sent on partial reload. Static value or sync/async callable.

```python
def defer(key: str, callback: Callable, group: str = "default") -> DeferredProp
```
Loaded after page render. Props in same group fetched together. Supports `.once()` chaining.

```python
def once(key: str, value_or_callable: T | Callable) -> OnceProp
```
Included in initial load, cached client-side. Not re-sent on subsequent visits.

```python
def optional(key: str, callback: Callable) -> OptionalProp
```
Never included unless explicitly requested. For WhenVisible component.

```python
def always(key: str, value: T) -> AlwaysProp
```
Always included, even during partial reloads. For auth state, permissions.

```python
def merge(key: str, value: T, strategy: Literal['append','prepend','deep'] = "append", match_on: str | list[str] | None = None) -> MergeProp
```
Combine data during partial reloads instead of replacing.

```python
def scroll_props(page_name: str = "page", current_page: int = 1, previous_page: int | None = None, next_page: int | None = None) -> ScrollPropsConfig
```
Infinite scroll pagination state for Inertia v2.

### Prop Filters

```python
def only(*keys: str) -> PropFilter
```
Include only specified props.

```python
def except_(*keys: str) -> PropFilter
```
Exclude specified props.

### Session Helpers

```python
def share(connection: ASGIConnection, key: str, value: Any) -> bool
```
Share value in session, included in every Inertia response props.

```python
def error(connection: ASGIConnection, key: str, message: str) -> bool
```
Set validation error message in session, included in `errors` prop.

```python
def flash(connection: ASGIConnection, message: str, category: str = "info") -> bool
```
Add flash message to session, included in `flash` prop. Auto-cleared after display.

```python
def clear_history(connection: ASGIConnection) -> None
```
Mark next response to clear client history encryption keys.

### Internal Helpers

```python
def get_shared_props(request, partial_data=None, partial_except=None) -> dict
def extract_deferred_props(props: dict) -> dict[str, list[str]]
def extract_merge_props(props: dict) -> tuple[list[str], list[str], list[str], list[str]]
def extract_once_props(props: dict, partial_data=None, partial_except=None) -> list[str]
```

---

## Inertia Response Classes

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia.response`

### InertiaResponse

```python
class InertiaResponse(Response[T]):
    def __init__(
        self,
        content: T,
        *,
        template_name: str | None = None,
        template_str: str | None = None,
        background: BackgroundTask | BackgroundTasks | None = None,
        context: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        cookies: ResponseCookies | None = None,
        encoding: str = "utf-8",
        headers: ResponseHeaders | None = None,
        media_type: MediaType | str | None = None,
        status_code: int = 200,
        type_encoders: TypeEncodersMap | None = None,
        encrypt_history: bool | None = None,
        clear_history: bool = False,
        scroll_props: ScrollPropsConfig | None = None,
    ) -> None: ...
```

Behavior:
- If not an Inertia request and no route component: returns content as JSON
- If `X-Inertia` header present: returns page props as JSON
- If mode="hybrid": uses `AppHandler` (SPA mode rendering with the configured Inertia transport)
- Otherwise: renders Jinja2 template
- Async `defer`/`lazy`/`once`/`optional` callbacks are pre-resolved on the request loop before serialization (see `InertiaPlugin` notes)

### InertiaRedirect

```python
class InertiaRedirect(Redirect):
    def __init__(self, request: Request, redirect_to: str, **kwargs) -> None: ...
```
Status: 307 for GET, 303 for other methods. Same-origin validation; falls back to base URL on cross-origin.

### InertiaExternalRedirect

```python
class InertiaExternalRedirect(Response):
    def __init__(self, request: Request, redirect_to: str, **kwargs) -> None: ...
```
Status: 409 Conflict with `X-Inertia-Location` header. For cross-origin redirects (no same-origin check).

### InertiaBack

```python
class InertiaBack(Redirect):
    def __init__(self, request: Request, **kwargs) -> None: ...
```
Redirects to `Referer` header with same-origin validation.

---

## Inertia Middleware

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia.middleware`

```python
class InertiaMiddleware(AbstractMiddleware):
    async def __call__(self, scope: Scope, receive: Receive, send: Send) -> None: ...

def get_current_inertia_request() -> InertiaRequest[Any, Any, Any] | None: ...
def redirect_on_asset_version_mismatch(request: InertiaRequest[Any, Any, Any]) -> InertiaExternalRedirect | None: ...
```

Detects asset version mismatches between client (`X-Inertia-Version` header)
and server (`VitePlugin.asset_loader.version_id`). On mismatch, returns
409 Conflict with `X-Inertia-Location` to trigger client-side hard refresh.

`get_current_inertia_request()` exposes the current Inertia request via a
`ContextVar` for use in handler wrappers (e.g., async prop pre-resolution).

---

## Inertia Request

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia.request`

### InertiaRequest

```python
class InertiaRequest(Request[UserT, AuthT, StateT]):
    inertia: InertiaDetails

    @property
    def is_inertia(self) -> bool: ...
    @property
    def inertia_enabled(self) -> bool: ...
    @property
    def is_partial_render(self) -> bool: ...
    @property
    def partial_keys(self) -> set[str]: ...
    @property
    def partial_except_keys(self) -> set[str]: ...
    @property
    def except_once_props_keys(self) -> set[str]: ...
    @property
    def reset_keys(self) -> set[str]: ...
    @property
    def error_bag(self) -> str | None: ...
    @property
    def merge_intent(self) -> str | None: ...
    @property
    def inertia_version(self) -> str | None: ...
    @property
    def is_precognition(self) -> bool: ...
    @property
    def precognition_validate_only(self) -> set[str]: ...
```

### InertiaDetails

```python
class InertiaDetails:
    def __init__(self, request: Request) -> None: ...
    def __bool__(self) -> bool: ...  # True if X-Inertia: true

    route_component: str | None
    partial_component: str | None
    partial_data: str | None
    partial_except: str | None
    except_once_props: str | None
    reset_props: str | None
    error_bag: str | None
    merge_intent: str | None
    version: str | None
    referer: str | None
    is_partial_render: bool
    partial_keys: list[str]
    partial_except_keys: list[str]
    except_once_props_keys: list[str]
    reset_keys: list[str]
    is_precognition: bool
    precognition_validate_only: list[str]
```

### InertiaHeaders enum

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia._utils`

```python
class InertiaHeaders(str, Enum):
    ENABLED = "X-Inertia"
    VERSION = "X-Inertia-Version"
    LOCATION = "X-Inertia-Location"
    REFERER = "Referer"
    PARTIAL_DATA = "X-Inertia-Partial-Data"
    PARTIAL_COMPONENT = "X-Inertia-Partial-Component"
    PARTIAL_EXCEPT = "X-Inertia-Partial-Except"
    EXCEPT_ONCE_PROPS = "X-Inertia-Except-Once-Props"
    RESET = "X-Inertia-Reset"
    ERROR_BAG = "X-Inertia-Error-Bag"
    INFINITE_SCROLL_MERGE_INTENT = "X-Inertia-Infinite-Scroll-Merge-Intent"
    PRECOGNITION = "Precognition"
    PRECOGNITION_SUCCESS = "Precognition-Success"
    PRECOGNITION_VALIDATE_ONLY = "Precognition-Validate-Only"
```

Re-exported from `litestar_vite.inertia` and `litestar_vite.inertia.request`.

---

## Precognition

Source: `litestar_vite.inertia.precognition`

```python
def precognition(fn: Callable) -> Callable
```
Decorator for route handlers. When the `Precognition` header is present and
validation passes, returns 204 `No Content` (with `Precognition-Success: true`)
instead of executing the handler body.

```python
class PrecognitionResponse(Response[Any]):
    def __init__(self) -> None: ...
```
Returns 204 with `Precognition-Success: true` header.

```python
def create_precognition_exception_handler(
    *, fallback_handler: Callable | None = None
) -> Callable
```
Creates a `ValidationException` handler that:
- Returns 422 with `{ "message": "...", "errors": {...} }` and
  `Precognition: true` for Precognition requests.
- Returns 204 (`PrecognitionResponse`) when `Precognition-Validate-Only`
  filtered all errors away.
- Falls back to the supplied handler (or a default JSON 422 response) for
  non-Precognition requests.

```python
def normalize_validation_errors(exc: ValidationException, validate_only: set[str] | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]
```
Normalizes Litestar validation detail to Laravel's
`{"message": "...", "errors": {"field": ["msg"]}}` format. `validate_only`
restricts which fields are reported.

---

## Code Generation

Source: `litestar_vite.codegen`

```python
def export_integration_assets(app: Litestar, config: ViteConfig) -> ExportResult
```
Unified export of OpenAPI schema, routes JSON, routes TypeScript, schemas
helpers, and Inertia page-props metadata. Returns an `ExportResult` listing
which files were updated vs. unchanged. CLI commands and the plugin both call
this to keep output byte-identical.

```python
def generate_routes_json(app: Litestar, only=None, exclude=None, include_components=True) -> dict
def generate_routes_ts(app: Litestar, only=None, exclude=None, global_route=False) -> str
def generate_inertia_pages_json(app: Litestar, config: ViteConfig) -> str
def extract_route_metadata(app: Litestar) -> list[RouteMetadata]
def extract_inertia_pages(app: Litestar) -> list[InertiaPageMetadata]
def encode_deterministic_json(value: Any) -> bytes
def write_if_changed(path: Path, content: bytes | str) -> bool
def strip_timestamp_for_comparison(value: bytes | str) -> bytes | str
```

Public re-exports: `ExportResult`, `InertiaPageMetadata`, `RouteMetadata`,
`encode_deterministic_json`, `export_integration_assets`,
`extract_inertia_pages`, `extract_route_metadata`,
`generate_inertia_pages_json`, `generate_routes_json`, `generate_routes_ts`,
`strip_timestamp_for_comparison`, `write_if_changed`.

---

## CLI Commands

All commands are under `litestar assets`.

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `doctor` | Diagnose and fix Vite config issues. Options: `--check`, `--fix`, `--no-prompt`, `--verbose`, `--show-config`, `--runtime-checks` |
| `init` | Initialize Vite project with framework templates. Options: `--template`, `--root-path`, `--frontend-dir`, `--bundle-path`, `--resource-path`, `--static-path`, `--asset-url`, `--vite-port`, `--enable-ssr`/`--disable-ssr`, `--tailwind`, `--enable-types`, `--generate-zod`, `--generate-client`, `--overwrite`, `--verbose`, `--no-prompt`, `--no-install` |
| `install` | Install frontend packages. Options: `--verbose`, `--quiet` |
| `update` | Update frontend packages. Options: `--latest`, `--verbose`, `--quiet` |
| `build` | Build frontend assets. Options: `--verbose`, `--quiet` |
| `serve` | Serve frontend (dev or production). Options: `--verbose`, `--quiet`, `--production` |
| `deploy` | Build and deploy to CDN storage. Options: `--storage`, `--storage-option` (repeatable `key=value`), `--no-build`, `--dry-run`, `--no-delete`, `--verbose` |
| `export-routes` | Export route metadata. Options: `--output`, `--only`, `--except`, `--include-components`, `--typescript`/`--ts`, `--verbose` |
| `generate-types` | Generate TypeScript types from OpenAPI and routes. Runs `extra_commands` (e.g., `tsr generate`) then `litestar-vite-typegen`. Options: `--verbose` |
| `status` | Check Vite integration status (manifest, dev server reachability) |

Available init templates: `react`, `react-router`, `react-tanstack`,
`react-inertia`, `vue`, `vue-inertia`, `svelte`, `svelte-inertia`, `sveltekit`,
`nuxt`, `astro`, `htmx`, `angular`, `angular-cli`.

---

## TypeScript API

### Vite Plugin (`litestar-vite-plugin`)

Source: `src/js/src/index.ts`

```typescript
interface PluginConfig {
  input: string | string[]
  assetUrl?: string               // default: '/static/'
  deployAssetUrl?: string         // from .litestar.json deployAssetUrl
  bundleDir?: string              // default: 'public/dist'
  staticDir?: string              // default: '${resourceDir}/public'
  resourceDir?: string            // default: 'src'
  hotFile?: string                // default: '${bundleDir}/hot'
  ssr?: string | string[]
  ssrOutDir?: string              // default: '${resourceDir}/bootstrap/ssr'
  refresh?: boolean | string | string[] | RefreshConfig | RefreshConfig[]
  detectTls?: string | boolean | null
  autoDetectIndex?: boolean       // default: true
  inertiaMode?: boolean           // default: false (auto-detected from .litestar.json)
  transformOnServe?: (code: string, url: DevServerUrl) => string
  types?: boolean | 'auto' | TypesConfig  // default: undefined (auto from .litestar.json)
  executor?: "node" | "bun" | "deno" | "yarn" | "pnpm"
}

interface TypesConfig {
  enabled?: boolean               // default: false
  output?: string                 // default: 'src/generated'
  openapiPath?: string            // default: 'src/generated/openapi.json'
  routesPath?: string             // default: 'src/generated/routes.json'
  schemasTsPath?: string
  pagePropsPath?: string          // default: 'src/generated/inertia-pages.json'
  generateZod?: boolean           // default: false
  generateSdk?: boolean           // default: true
  generateRoutes?: boolean        // default: true
  generatePageProps?: boolean     // default: true
  generateSchemas?: boolean       // default: true
  globalRoute?: boolean           // default: false
  debounce?: number               // default: 300
}

export default function litestar(config: string | string[] | PluginConfig): any[]
```

Returns a `Plugin[]` typed as `any[]` to avoid version conflicts across Vite 7
and 8. The plugin always pushes a virtual-module plugin for
`virtual:litestar-static-props`; it pushes the type generation plugin only when
`types` resolves to enabled.

### Helpers (`litestar-vite-plugin/helpers`)

Sources: `src/js/src/helpers/csrf.ts`, `htmx.ts`, `routes.ts`, re-exported via
`src/js/src/helpers/index.ts`.

```typescript
// CSRF
export function getCsrfToken(): string
// csrfHeaders() and csrfFetch() use Litestar's default X-CSRFToken header and
// read from injected window/meta/Inertia page state rather than the cookie itself.
export function csrfHeaders(additionalHeaders?: Record<string, string>): Record<string, string>
export function csrfFetch(url: string, options?: RequestInit): Promise<Response>

// HTMX
export function addDirective(name: string, handler: Function): void
export function registerHtmxExtension(name: string, ext: object): void
export function setHtmxDebug(enabled: boolean): void
export function swapJson(target: Element, data: unknown): void

// Route matching
export function createRouteHelpers(routes: RouteDefinitions): RouteHelpers
export function isCurrentRoute(name: string): boolean
export function currentRoute(): string | null
export function isRoute(name: string, path: string): boolean
export function toRoute(name: string, params?: Record<string, unknown>): string
// types
export type RouteDefinition
export type RouteDefinitions
export type RouteHelpers
```

### Inertia Helpers (`litestar-vite-plugin/inertia-helpers`)

Source: `src/js/src/inertia-helpers/index.ts`

```typescript
// Overload 1: ES modules with default export — extracts .default automatically
export function resolvePageComponent<T>(
  path: string | string[],
  pages: Record<string, Promise<{ default: T }> | (() => Promise<{ default: T }>)>
): Promise<T>

// Overload 2: Direct values
export function resolvePageComponent<T>(
  path: string | string[],
  pages: Record<string, Promise<T> | (() => Promise<T>)>
): Promise<T>

export function unwrapPageProps<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(props: T): T
```

Pagination types exported: `OffsetPaginationProps`, `ClassicPaginationProps`,
`CursorPaginationProps`, `PaginationProps` (union), `ScrollProps`.

Precognition exports:

```typescript
export const PrecognitionHeaders: { PRECOGNITION: string, VALIDATE_ONLY: string, PRECOGNITION_SUCCESS: string }
export interface PrecognitionValidationErrors { message: string; errors: Record<string, string[]> }
export interface PrecognitionFormConfig { /* ... */ }
export function isPrecognitionSuccess(response: Response): boolean
export function isPrecognitionError(response: Response): boolean
export function extractPrecognitionErrors(response: Response): Promise<PrecognitionValidationErrors>
```

### npm Exports

| Path | Description |
|---|---|
| `litestar-vite-plugin` | Main Vite plugin |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/helpers` | CSRF, HTMX, route helpers |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/inertia-helpers` | resolvePageComponent, pagination types, precognition helpers |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/astro` | Astro integration |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/sveltekit` | SvelteKit integration |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/nuxt` | Nuxt integration |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/inertia` | Inertia type definitions |
| `litestar-vite-plugin/virtual` | Virtual module type declarations |

### npm Binaries

| Binary | Description |
|---|---|
| `clean-orphaned-assets` | Remove orphaned build assets |
| `litestar-vite-typegen` | Unified TypeScript type generation CLI |

---

## Bridge File (.litestar.json)

Source: `src/js/src/shared/bridge-schema.ts`

The bridge file is the Python-to-JavaScript configuration contract.
Written by `VitePlugin` on startup, read by the Vite plugin. The project is
pre-1.0 — there are no legacy keys and unknown keys cause the Vite plugin to
fail fast with a clear error.

```typescript
type BridgeMode = "spa" | "template" | "htmx" | "hybrid" | "inertia" | "framework" | "ssr" | "ssg" | "external"
type BridgeProxyMode = "vite" | "direct" | "proxy" | null
type BridgeExecutor = "node" | "bun" | "deno" | "yarn" | "pnpm"

interface BridgeTypesConfig {
  enabled: boolean
  output: string
  openapiPath: string
  routesPath: string
  pagePropsPath: string
  routesTsPath?: string
  schemasTsPath?: string
  generateZod: boolean
  generateSdk: boolean
  generateRoutes: boolean
  generatePageProps: boolean
  generateSchemas: boolean   // optional in payload; defaults to true
  globalRoute: boolean
}

interface BridgeSpaConfig {
  /** Use script element instead of data-page attribute for Inertia page data */
  useScriptElement: boolean
}

interface BridgeSchema {
  assetUrl: string
  deployAssetUrl: string | null
  appUrl: string | null
  bundleDir: string
  resourceDir: string
  staticDir: string
  hotFile: string
  manifest: string

  mode: BridgeMode
  proxyMode: BridgeProxyMode
  host: string
  port: number

  ssrOutDir: string | null

  types: BridgeTypesConfig | null
  spa: BridgeSpaConfig | null
  executor: BridgeExecutor

  logging: {
    level: "quiet" | "normal" | "verbose"
    showPathsAbsolute: boolean
    suppressNpmOutput: boolean
    suppressViteBanner: boolean
    timestamps: boolean
  } | null

  litestarVersion: string
  staticProps?: Record<string, unknown> | null
}
```

Located at `.litestar.json` in the project root, or override via the
`LITESTAR_VITE_CONFIG_PATH` env var. Static props from `ViteConfig.static_props`
are accessible in JavaScript via:

```typescript
import staticProps from 'virtual:litestar-static-props'
```

---

## Modes

| Mode | Description |
|---|---|
| `spa` | Vite serves index.html, Litestar serves API. SPA handler catches all non-API routes. |
| `template` | Litestar renders Jinja2 templates with Vite asset tags. |
| `htmx` | Alias for template mode, optimized for HTMX partials. |
| `hybrid` | Inertia.js mode. Litestar renders full-page HTML with a JSON `<script>` payload by default, or with a `data-page` attribute when `use_script_element=False`; XHR visits return JSON. |
| `framework` | Meta-framework mode (Astro, Nuxt, SvelteKit). Dev: proxy to framework dev server. Prod: serve built output. |
| `external` | Non-Vite frameworks (e.g. Angular CLI). Dev: no proxy. Prod: serve `bundle_dir`. |

Mode aliases: `"ssr"` -> `"framework"`, `"ssg"` -> `"framework"`, `"inertia"` -> `"hybrid"`.

## Proxy Modes

| Proxy Mode | Description |
|---|---|
| `vite` (default) | Allow-list: only proxy Vite assets (SPA mode) |
| `direct` | Expose Vite port directly, no proxy (two-port) |
| `proxy` | Deny-list: proxy everything except Litestar routes (framework mode) |
| `None` | No proxy (production) |

Set via the `VITE_PROXY_MODE` env var (`"none"` is accepted to disable).

---

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `VITE_DEV_MODE` | Enable dev mode (true/1/yes/on) |
| `VITE_HOST` | Vite dev server host (default: 127.0.0.1) |
| `VITE_PORT` | Vite dev server port (default: 5173) |
| `VITE_PROXY_MODE` | Proxy mode: vite, direct, proxy, none |
| `VITE_PROTOCOL` | Set by the plugin to mirror `RuntimeConfig.protocol` |
| `VITE_BASE_URL` | Base URL for app (also exported during build) |
| `VITE_AUTO_DEV_MODE` | Auto-enable dev mode when no built assets (default: True) |
| `VITE_ALLOW_REMOTE` | Allow non-loopback Vite host (default: False; auto-set to True by the plugin in dev) |
| `VITE_HEALTH_CHECK` | Enable dev server health check |
| `VITE_PROXY_DEBUG` | Verbose dev-proxy logging (1/true/yes) |
| `ASSET_URL` | Static asset URL prefix (default: /static/) |
| `APP_URL` | Public application URL (auto-set to `http://<LITESTAR_HOST>:<LITESTAR_PORT>` when missing) |
| `LITESTAR_HOST` | Backend host used to derive `APP_URL` (default: 127.0.0.1) |
| `LITESTAR_PORT` / `PORT` | Backend port used to derive `APP_URL` (defaults to inferred argv port or 8000) |
| `LITESTAR_VERSION` | Litestar version emitted into `.litestar.json` (auto-resolved when unset) |
| `LITESTAR_VITE_RUNTIME` | JS executor name written to env for the npm plugin (set from `RuntimeConfig.executor`) |
| `LITESTAR_VITE_INSTALL_CMD` | Cached install command (joined `install_command`) |
| `LITESTAR_VITE_LOG_LEVEL` | Log level: quiet, normal, verbose |
| `LITESTAR_VITE_CONFIG_PATH` | Override `.litestar.json` path (read by both Python and the npm plugin) |
| `LITESTAR_TRUSTED_PROXIES` | Trusted proxy IPs / CIDRs (or `*`) for X-Forwarded-* headers |
| `LITESTAR_OPENAPI_PATH` | Set when an OpenAPI config is detected; surfaces the schema URL to JS |
| `VITE_DEPLOY_STORAGE` | fsspec URL for deploy target |
| `VITE_DEPLOY_ASSET_URL` | Public CDN URL for deployed assets |
| `VITE_DEPLOY_DELETE` | Delete orphaned remote files (default: true) |
| `NUXT_HOST` / `NUXT_PORT` / `NITRO_HOST` / `NITRO_PORT` / `HOST` / `PORT` | Set by the plugin so framework dev servers bind to the same host/port as Vite |
| `VIRTUAL_ENV` | Read by the `nodeenv` executor to discover the venv root |

---

## Examples

Example applications in the `examples/` directory:

| Directory | Description |
|---|---|
| `angular` | Angular with Vite |
| `angular-cli` | Angular with Angular CLI (external mode) |
| `astro` | Astro SSG framework mode |
| `jinja-htmx` | Jinja2 + HTMX template mode |
| `nuxt` | Nuxt framework mode |
| `react` | React SPA |
| `react-inertia` | React + Inertia.js hybrid mode |
| `react-inertia-jinja` | React + Inertia.js + Jinja2 template mode |
| `react-tanstack` | React + TanStack Router (with `tsr generate` extra command) |
| `svelte` | Svelte SPA |
| `sveltekit` | SvelteKit framework mode |
| `vue` | Vue SPA |
| `vue-inertia` | Vue + Inertia.js hybrid mode |
| `vue-inertia-jinja` | Vue + Inertia.js + Jinja2 template mode |

---

## Quick Start

### SPA Mode

```python
from litestar import Litestar
from litestar_vite import VitePlugin, ViteConfig

app = Litestar(
    plugins=[VitePlugin(config=ViteConfig(dev_mode=True))],
)
```

### Template/HTMX Mode

```python
from litestar import Litestar
from litestar.contrib.jinja import JinjaTemplateEngine
from litestar.template.config import TemplateConfig
from litestar_vite import VitePlugin, ViteConfig

app = Litestar(
    plugins=[VitePlugin(config=ViteConfig(mode="template", dev_mode=True))],
    template_config=TemplateConfig(engine=JinjaTemplateEngine, directory="templates"),
)
```

In template:
```html
{{ vite_hmr() }}
{{ vite("src/main.ts") }}
```

### Inertia.js Mode

```python
from litestar import Litestar, get
from litestar.middleware.session import SessionMiddleware
from litestar_vite import VitePlugin, ViteConfig, InertiaConfig
from litestar_vite.inertia import InertiaResponse

app = Litestar(
    plugins=[
        VitePlugin(config=ViteConfig(
            inertia=InertiaConfig(
                ssr=True,
            ),
            dev_mode=True,
        ))
    ],
    middleware=[SessionMiddleware(...)],
)

@get("/", component="Home")
async def index() -> InertiaResponse:
    return InertiaResponse({"greeting": "Hello"})
```

Browser bootstrap for the default script-element transport (Inertia v2 only;
v3 enables this transport by default):

```typescript
createInertiaApp({
  defaults: {
    future: {
      useScriptElementForInitialPage: true,
    },
  },
  // resolve/setup...
})
```

SSR notes:
- Use the normal browser entry (`resources/main.tsx` / `resources/main.ts`) for hydration and client-side visits.
- Add `resources/ssr.tsx` or `resources/ssr.ts` for the Node SSR server entry when `InertiaConfig(ssr=True)` is enabled.
- When you stay on the default script-element transport, keep `defaults.future.useScriptElementForInitialPage` in both entries for Inertia v2 so server rendering and hydration use the same initial-page transport. Set `use_script_element=False` to keep the legacy `data-page` bootstrap instead.

### Framework Mode (Astro/Nuxt/SvelteKit)

```python
from litestar import Litestar
from litestar_vite import VitePlugin, ViteConfig

app = Litestar(
    plugins=[
        VitePlugin(config=ViteConfig(
            mode="framework",
            dev_mode=True,
        ))
    ],
)
```

### Type Generation

```python
from litestar_vite import VitePlugin, ViteConfig, TypeGenConfig

ViteConfig(
    types=True,  # or TypeGenConfig(generate_zod=True, generate_sdk=True)
    dev_mode=True,
)
```

```javascript
// vite.config.ts
import { litestar } from 'litestar-vite-plugin'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    litestar({ input: 'src/main.ts' }),  // types auto-read from .litestar.json
  ],
})
```

---

## Python Module List

```

litestar_vite.config.__init__
litestar_vite.config._constants

litestar_vite.plugin._proxy
litestar_vite.plugin._proxy_headers
litestar_vite.plugin._static
litestar_vite.plugin._utils

litestar_vite.handler._routing

litestar_vite.inertia._utils

litestar_vite.inertia.helpers
litestar_vite.inertia.middleware

litestar_vite.inertia.request
litestar_vite.inertia.response
litestar_vite.inertia.types

litestar_vite.codegen._inertia
litestar_vite.codegen._openapi
litestar_vite.codegen._routes
litestar_vite.codegen._ts

litestar_vite.deploy
litestar_vite.doctor

litestar_vite.scaffolding.templates

litestar_vite.utils
```

## TypeScript Module List

```
src/js/src/index.ts                       # Main Vite plugin
src/js/src/helpers/index.ts               # CSRF, HTMX, route helpers (re-exports)
src/js/src/helpers/csrf.ts                # CSRF utilities
src/js/src/helpers/htmx.ts                # HTMX utilities
src/js/src/helpers/routes.ts              # Route helpers
src/js/src/inertia-helpers/index.ts       # resolvePageComponent, pagination, precognition
src/js/src/shared/bridge-schema.ts        # Bridge file schema + parser
src/js/src/shared/constants.ts            # Shared constants
src/js/src/shared/debounce.ts             # Debounce utility
src/js/src/shared/format-path.ts          # Path formatting
src/js/src/shared/logger.ts               # Logger
src/js/src/shared/typegen-plugin.ts       # Type generation Vite plugin
src/js/src/shared/typegen-core.ts         # Type generation core logic
src/js/src/shared/typegen-cache.ts        # Type generation cache
src/js/src/shared/write-if-changed.ts     # Write-if-changed utility
src/js/src/shared/emit-page-props-types.ts # Page props type emitter
src/js/src/shared/emit-schemas-types.ts   # Schemas type emitter
src/js/src/shared/emit-static-props-types.ts # Static props type emitter
src/js/src/shared/network.ts              # Network utilities
src/js/src/shared/vite-compat.ts          # Vite 7/8 compatibility shims
src/js/src/litestar-meta.ts               # Litestar metadata loader
src/js/src/typegen-cli.ts                 # Type generation CLI entry
src/js/src/install-hint.ts                # Install hint
src/js/src/astro.ts                       # Astro integration
src/js/src/sveltekit.ts                   # SvelteKit integration
src/js/src/nuxt.ts                        # Nuxt integration
src/js/src/inertia-types.ts               # Inertia type definitions
src/js/src/virtual.d.ts                   # Virtual module type declarations
src/js/src/dev-server/vite.config.ts      # Internal Vite config bundling the dev-server placeholder
src/js/src/server-starting/vite.config.ts # Internal Vite config bundling the server-starting page
```

## Public Python Exports

```python
from litestar_vite import (
    DeployConfig,
    ExternalDevServer,
    InertiaConfig,
    InertiaSSRConfig,
    PathConfig,
    RuntimeConfig,
    TypeGenConfig,
    ViteAssetLoader,
    ViteConfig,
    VitePlugin,
    inertia,
)

from litestar_vite.inertia import (
    AlwaysProp,
    InertiaBack,
    InertiaConfig,
    InertiaDetails,
    InertiaExternalRedirect,
    InertiaHeaders,
    InertiaMiddleware,
    InertiaPlugin,
    InertiaRedirect,
    InertiaRequest,
    InertiaResponse,
    OnceProp,
    OptionalProp,
    PrecognitionResponse,
    PropFilter,
    always,
    clear_history,
    create_inertia_exception_response,
    create_precognition_exception_handler,
    defer,
    error,
    except_,
    exception_to_http_response,
    extract_deferred_props,
    extract_merge_props,
    extract_once_props,
    flash,
    get_shared_props,
    helpers,
    lazy,
    merge,
    normalize_validation_errors,
    once,
    only,
    optional,
    precognition,
    scroll_props,
    share,
)
```
